name: code_review
description: LLM-powered code review tool — sends a file to the configured LLM and returns structured findings

tools.name: code_review
tools.description: Review a source file with the configured LLM. Returns quality, security, and improvement notes.

file_path.description: Relative or absolute path to the file to review

model.description: LLM model override; defaults to the runtime's configured review model

focus.description: Optional review focus: security | quality | architecture | all (default: all)
